extraction.one_line_summary: POGAČAR attacked in final 200m of Grand Colombier summit finish, gained 4 seconds on ROGLIČ who covered the move, BERNAL lost 7:19
tactical_patterns: POGAČAR waited until final 200m of Grand Colombier to attack ROGLIČ, testing legs without committing earlier.
ROGLIČ marked POGAČAR's acceleration but couldn't contest sprint, revealing defensive posture despite yellow jersey.
INEOS domestiques collapsed completely; CARAPAZ crashed mid-stage, BERNAL lost 7:19, exposing team implosion after IGUITA DNS.
DUMOULIN pulled massively for Jumbo-Visma through finish despite GC position, signaling team prioritizes ROGLIČ over own placement.

rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: positive: second stage win in week, gaining confidence and seconds incrementally against supposedly unstoppable ROGLIČ
rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: neutral: covered POGAČAR but couldn't match final acceleration, playing defense not offense despite 40-second lead
rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: negative: lost 7:19 on Grand Colombier, effectively eliminated from GC contention as defending champion
rider_signals.IGUITA Sergio: negative: DNS after early-stage crash while attempting breakaway, emotional exit as Colombian champion in debut Tour
rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: negative: crashed mid-stage when team needed him as INEOS co-leader, left BERNAL isolated
rider_signals.DUMOULIN Tom: positive: massive pull to finish for ROGLIČ despite own GC position at 10th, ultimate domestique performance
rider_signals.PORT Richie: positive: jumped from 9th to 6th GC, matched POGAČAR/ROGLIČ accelerations until final 200m
rider_signals.URAN Rigoberto: positive: moved to 3rd overall, quietly consistent while INEOS collapsed around him
